fullText: i'll show you how to complete a lightning-fast sonar cube analysis involving github and jenkins assuming you have a repository in github as i do here by including a jenkins file within the repository as covered in our documentation you can have sonarcube analysis automatically included as part of jenkins pipeline runs on the jenkins side assuming you have the sonarcube scanner for jenkins plugin installed as well as the branch source for github and by adding a few simple parameters such as the branch source we must specify github some credentials the location of our repository as well as specifying that we would like to discover branches pull requests where we must build the current revision and this is all now we have a quality gate result as well as some matters for your developers to pay attention to you
